name: Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken white meat, cooked and diced
8 ounces light cream cheese, cut in 8 long strips
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13-by-9-by-2-inch baking dish.
In a large bowl, mix together 1 3/4 cups sour cream, diced green chiles, chopped green onions, chopped cilantro, and ground cumin. Stir in the cooked chicken and one cup of grated cheddar cheese. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Spoon about half a cup of filling onto the center of each tortilla. Place a cream cheese strip on top of the filling. Roll up each tortilla tightly, seam-side down, and place them in the baking dish.
Pour picante sauce or salsa over the enchiladas until they are completely covered. Cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes, or until the sauce bubbles and the enchiladas are heated through.
Remove the foil and sprinkle the remaining cheddar cheese evenly over the top of the enchiladas. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
Serve topped with extra sour cream and garnished with fresh cilantro, if desired.
